# self-evolving-retrainer — Shadow-Gated Prompt Optimization

> A Cloudflare Worker that implements Ralph-style micro-optimization slices,
> Pareto front promotion queues, and shadow-gated blended scoring for
> continuous prompt improvement without regression.

## Overview
- [README](https://github.com/Genesis-Conductor-Engine/self-evolving-retrainer#readme)
- [Architecture](https://github.com/Genesis-Conductor-Engine/self-evolving-retrainer/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)

## Key Concepts
- **Ralph micro-slices**: Small, isolated prompt variations tested in shadow mode
- **Pareto front**: Multi-objective optimization balancing accuracy, latency, and cost
- **Shadow-gated scoring**: A/B testing without user-facing impact
- **Queue-safe promotion**: Atomic promotion of winning variants

## API
- POST /optimize: Submit a prompt for optimization
- GET /variants/:id: Retrieve variant performance metrics
- POST /promote: Promote a winning variant to production

## Stack
- Cloudflare Workers (runtime)
- D1 (SQLite for variant storage)
- KV (fast reads for active variants)
- Queues (async evaluation pipeline)
